ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "alias" TEXT /* Alias or alternate name of the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "first_appeared" TEXT /* Date the character first appeared in a show */,
  "last_appeared" TEXT /* Date the character last appeared in a show */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the character record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the character record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the character record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the character record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the show */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network or platform where the show aired */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the show */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the show */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the show */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the show record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the show record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the show record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the show record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the show where the episode belongs */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Air date of the episode */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the episode record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the episode record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the episode record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the episode record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "perpetrator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who committed the crime */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who was the victim */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode where the incident occurred */,
  "clued_word" TEXT /* Clued word used in the accusation */,
  "extra_letter" TEXT /* Extra letter used in the accusation */,
  "accusation" TEXT /* Detailed description of the accusation */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the incident record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the incident record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the incident record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the incident record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_perpetrator_id FOREIGN KEY ("perpetrator_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "character_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first character in the relationship */,
  "character_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second character in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., partner, rival, family) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the relationship record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the relationship record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_character_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("character_id_1") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_relationships_character_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("character_id_2") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character in the role */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show where the role was played */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode where the role was played */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., protagonist, antagonist) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the role record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the role record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_roles_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_roles_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_roles_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appearance */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character appearing */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show where the character appeared */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode where the character appeared */,
  "appearance_date" TEXT /* Date of the appearance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the appearance */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the appearance record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the appearance record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the appearance record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the appearance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_appearances_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_appearances_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_appearances_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the comment record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the comment record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the comment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the rating record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the rating record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the rating record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the rating record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_ratings_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the user record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show produced */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "producer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the producer's involvement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the producer's involvement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the producer record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the producer record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the producer record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the producer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_producers_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode written */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "writer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the writer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the writer record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the writer record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the writer record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the writer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_writers_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the incident type record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the incident type record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the incident type record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the incident type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types_incidents" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the mapping record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the mapping record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_types_incidents_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_types_incidents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_warnings" (
  "warning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warning */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident with a warning */,
  "warning_text" TEXT /* Text of the warning */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the warning record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the warning record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the warning record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the warning record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_warnings_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident with a link */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the link */,
  "link_description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the link record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the link record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the link record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the link record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_links_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)
